hero.label: /// New Engagements — 2026
hero.subheadline: A directing studio combining AI-augmented cinematic film with editorial-grade brand presence. Built for founders who treat their brand as their most important investment.

intro.label: /// 01 — Introduction

story.paragraph1: We came up through large agencies — editing campaign films, designing brand systems, building websites, directing motion work for clients we rarely got to meet. The craft was real. The work was repetitive. The recognition was someone else's.
story.paragraph2: So we left. We built a studio of our own — small, focused, selective — to do the work we always wanted to do, for founders who actually care about what they're building.

punchline.line1: What it means for your business:
punchline.line2: agency-grade craft, without the agency overhead.
punchline.line3: And a studio personally invested in the outcome.

intro.closing: This is what we deliver. Nothing more, nothing less.

work.label: /// 02 — Selected Work
work.heading: Recent engagements
work.intro: Current selected work. New engagements publishing as they close.
work.closing: Current engagements with premium brands publish here as they close. Subscribe to the studio email to be notified.

process.label: /// 03 — PROCESS
process.subtitle: Every engagement follows the same considered methodology. Predictable structure, custom outcome.

steps.label: STEP 01 / DISCOVERY
steps.title: The conversation
steps.description: A 30-minute call to understand the brand, the goals, and the constraints. We listen first, ask precise questions, and leave with enough clarity to propose a scope. No commitment yet.

steps.label: STEP 02 / CONCEPT
steps.title: Direction and treatment
steps.description: We translate your brief into a creative direction — visual references, narrative angles, mood. You receive a treatment document defining what we are about to build together.

steps.label: STEP 03 / PRODUCTION
steps.title: Cinematic craft
steps.description: The studio builds the work using our hybrid AI-augmented pipeline. You stay in the loop with checkpoint updates — but production noise stays with us, not with you.

steps.label: STEP 04 / REVIEW AT 80%
steps.title: Your sign-off, before final
steps.description: We deliver a near-final version for your review. Critical decisions are still adjustable — colour, pacing, copy, emphasis. Your alignment here is the lock-in for the final polish.

steps.label: STEP 05 / DELIVERY
steps.title: Final masters
steps.description: Polished, broadcast-quality files in every format you need. Hand-off includes source documentation, usage notes, and full ownership transfer. The studio remains available for future iterations.

process.closing:
Two to eight weeks from discovery to delivery.
No surprises. No middlemen. No translation losses.

services.label: /// 04 — Engagement Types
services.heading: Four ways to work together
services.intro: Every engagement is custom-scoped after a discovery call. These are the typical shapes our work takes.
services.caption: All engagements custom-quoted after discovery. Typical project duration: two to eight weeks.

items.name: Cinematic Brand Films
items.description: 15 to 90-second cinematic spots. AI-augmented direction with photorealistic finishing. Built for product launches, hero campaigns, and brand storytelling that needs to feel considered.

items.name: Editorial Brand Websites
items.description: Premium websites matching the cinematic feel of campaign work. Mobile-first, fast, considered. Designed to convert and built to last.

items.name: Visual Identity in Motion
items.description: Code-built motion design for logo systems, intros, outros, and brand animations. Pixel-perfect, infinitely scalable, broadcast-quality output.

items.name: Full Brand Engagements
items.description: Combined web + film + identity work. One studio, one vision, one point of contact. Designed for founders ready to invest in long-term brand presence.

contact.label: /// 05 — Begin
contact.intro: Thirty minutes by call or email. We discuss the brand, the goals, the timeline. If there is a fit, we propose a scope. If not, you walk away with honest feedback.

form.name: Your name
form.success: Message received. We'll be in touch within two business days.
form.error_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again or email hello@vantir.studio directly.
form.error_validation: Please check the form fields and try again.
form.error_rate_limit: Please wait a moment before sending another message.

forestAwakening.title: Forest Awakening
forestAwakening.shortDesc: A botanical ritual. Cinematic AI direction exploring ingredient provenance through magical realism.
forestAwakening.videoCaption: Forest Awakening — Full 15 second cut. 9:16 vertical.

brief.label: /// THE BRIEF
brief.title: The brief
brief.body: Belgian premium gin HAVN ANR — a small-batch spirit built on the narrative of returning home. The challenge: create a brand film that translates the gin's botanical complexity and Antwerp origin story into 15 seconds of vertical format, suitable for premium digital placements without using stock cinematography or generic AI imagery.

approach.label: /// THE APPROACH
approach.title: The approach
approach.body: A hybrid pipeline combining AI keyframe generation with cinematic 3D camera direction. Each ingredient — rhubarb, cinnamon, star anise, vanilla — receives its own dawn-forest moment, transforming through magical realism. Production used Nano Banana for stills, Kling 3.0 for animation, DaVinci Resolve for finishing. Total production time: nine days end-to-end.

result.label: /// THE RESULT
result.title: The result
result.body: A 15-second cinematic brand film delivered in vertical 9:16 for social-first placement, with a horizontal 16:9 cut for premium digital. Color-graded to broadcast standard, mastered at -14 LUFS. The film treats AI as a craft tool, not a shortcut — proving that intentional direction matters more than the generation method.
